privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic product data. The product 'Apex-Solv 5000' is a fictional formulation created by setup_task.sh containing four real chemicals: Sodium Hydroxide (CAS 1310-73-2), 2-Butoxyethanol (CAS 111-76-2), Sodium Metasilicate (CAS 6834-92-0), and Water (CAS 7732-18-5). The metadata lists only 3 ingredients, omitting Water. All CAS numbers are verified and correct. The task requires a 16-section GHS-compliant Safety Data Sheet with proper hazard classification (H290 and H314). The product data is stored at /home/ga/Documents/product_data.json and the expected output SDS file is /home/ga/Documents/SDS_ApexSolv5000.odt. The task uses Apache OpenOffice Writer and requires proper formatting with Heading 1 styles for section headers and ingredient table with CAS numbers.
